equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: heartbeat scheduled transaction synthesis exists, but the fee-exempt settlement behavior is missing.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Heartbeat revival scheduling is present, but no local builder/verifier path zeroes executor fee, total amount, or all settlement fees specifically for heartbeat async settlements.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ethereum/payload/src/lib.rs synthesizes heartbeat scheduled transactions and bypasses scheduler-routed handling.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs constructs delivery settlements with fees.executor_fee as total_amount and executor_fee.

crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs checks commitment/inclusion validators and fees are zero for delivery settlements, but does not enforce zero executor fee or total amount for heartbeat settlements.

notes: The checked code has heartbeat authorization but no heartbeat-specific zero-fee settlement branch.
rationale: The payload builder detects heartbeat scheduled transactions and skips wallet/TTL gates, zeroes all settlement fees for heartbeat settlements, and the verifier mirrors the heartbeat wallet bypass and zero-fee settlement behavior. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Heartbeat system transactions and their async settlements must skip wallet balance and TTL validation and must settle with zero executor, commitment, inclusion, and total fees.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build and verify a heartbeat revival async commitment from an owner with no wallet funds and long TTL, asserting builder includes it, verifier accepts it, and settlement calldata/payment fields have all fee amounts set to zero; assert a non-heartbeat async transaction still requires wallet and TTL checks.
summary: Heartbeat async settlements are not proven protocol-fee exempt.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build a heartbeat revival through async settlement and assert executor_fee, total_amount, commitment_fee, inclusion_fee, and validator addresses are all zero.
title: Heartbeat commitments are protocol-fee exempt
